dev_focus: BOLT TASK C2526: Delivery deadline tracking — Czech legal requirement. Full spec in .devloop/contexts/bolt.md. 5 steps: (1) Prisma schema + migrate, (2) checkout actions calc, (3) order confirmation page display, (4) confirmation email, (5) admin order detail with overdue warning. Run npm run build when done. When done, set next_suggested: lead.
notes: C2536 Lead — Bolt task 7092 is running (spawned 13:17:09 for C2534). If it's still alive, it should be implementing delivery deadline tracking from bolt.md. force_next: bolt ensures Bolt runs again immediately if 7092 was a no-op. Trace stays paused until Bolt commits real code. 12 cycles wasted (C2521-C2533) from empty bolt.md — now recovered. reset_no_change_counter to prevent auto-pause from the no-change streak. 9 open items, backlog healthy.

schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name → run_every integer (overrides DB value)

session_manager.kill_zombie_tasks: bool — kill tasks stuck as 'running' for >30min
session_manager.requeue_failed: list of task IDs to requeue (max 5)
session_manager.reset_no_change_counter: bool — prevent auto-pause from consecutive no-change cycles
